title: LIVE IMAGING OF i3NEURONS (Support Protocol 5)
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"d4cve","text":"Live imaging permits visualization of molecular and organellar dynamics within the neuron. While a standard confocal microscope is sufficient for short imaging experiments, extended imaging applications (\u003e1 hr) are best served by a 37 °C live imaging chamber outfitted onto the microscope. CM should also be changed to Hibernate A Low Fluorescence Medium (BrainBits LLC, cat. no. SKU#HAPR) for extended imaging. ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[{"key":0,"offset":371,"length":17}],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{"0":{"type":"link","mutability":"","data":{"guid":"82A761D0AFE511E9BAA10FCB1CB8E24C","url":"http://www.brainbitsllc.com/hibernate-a-low-fluorescence/"}}}}
guidelines: {"blocks":[{"key":"2op5o","text":"Live imaging permits visualization of molecular and organellar dynamics within the neuron. While a standard confocal microscope is sufficient for short imaging experiments, extended imaging applications (\u003e1 hr) are best served by a 37 °C live imaging chamber outfitted onto the microscope. CM should also be changed to Hibernate A Low Fluorescence Medium (BrainBits LLC, cat. no. SKU#HAPR) for extended imaging. Hibernate A permits long-term maintenance of neuronal cultures in ambient carbon dioxide levels (0.04 % vs. 5 % for standard cell culture incubators) and provides a better imaging environment by reducing autofluorescence from phenol red-containing medium. Finally, medium (either CM for short imaging or Hibernate A for extended imaging) should be supplemented with SOS neuronal supplement (Cell Guidance Systems, M09-50) instead of B27. SOS supplement does not contain phototoxic components present in B27 and other neuronal supplements. Imaging is best done on glass-bottom slides, such as Ibidi μ-slides (Ibidi, cat. no. 80827).","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[{"key":0,"offset":371,"length":17},{"key":1,"offset":826,"length":6},{"key":2,"offset":1027,"length":14}],"data":[]},{"key":"fa70c","text":"
